orientation: Practise negative numbers using the same structure from the learn lesson.

questions.question: Calculate -9 + 5
questions.hint: Move 5 right from -9 on a number line.

questions.question: Calculate (-4) × (-6)
questions.hint: Same signs in multiplication give positive.

questions.question: Calculate 18 ÷ (-3)
questions.hint: Different signs in division give negative.

common_mistakes.mistake: Forgetting that a negative times a negative is positive.
common_mistakes.correction: Use sign rules: same signs multiply/divide to positive.

common_mistakes.mistake: Treating subtraction of a negative as subtraction.
common_mistakes.correction: Subtracting a negative is the same as adding a positive.
Apply operation priority before combining signs.

summary: Subtraction of a negative becomes addition.
Apply BIDMAS even with signed numbers.
